Appearance

SproutDocumentation

Study smarter without leaving your Obsidian vault.

Get Started

Markdown First

Build cards your way - write in Markdown or use simple forms, then edit them seamlessly during review or in the flashcard browser.

Rich Card Types

Revise your notes with basic cards, cloze deletions, multiple-choice questions, image occlusions, and more.

FSRS Scheduler

Sprout is powered by the FSRS algorithm for optimal spacing, so you see your cards exactly when you need to.

Text to Speech

Built-in audio features reinforce your pronunciation and support language learning.

Released under the MIT License.
